revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ceb:Higashimuro-gun]][[en:Higashimuro District, Wakayama]][[eo:Distrikto Higashimuro]][[es:Distrito de Higashimuro]][[fa:شهرستان هیگاشی‌مورا، واکایاما]][[fr:District de Higashimuro]][[id:Distrik Higashimuro, Wakayama]][[it:Distretto di Higashimuro]][[ja:東牟婁郡]][[ko:히가시무로군]][[nl:Higashimuro]][[pl:Powiat Higashimuro]][[zh:東牟婁郡]]
{{unreferenced|date=October 2011}} [[File:Higashimuro District Map.png|thumb|Location of Higashimuro District in Wakayama Prefecture]] {{nihongo|'''Higashimuro'''|東牟婁郡|Higashimuro-gun}} is a {{ill|Districts of Japan|en|Districts of Japan|qid=Q1122846|lt=district|1=Districts of Japan}} located in {{ill|Wakayama Prefecture|en|Wakayama Prefecture|qid=Q131314|lt=Wakayama Prefecture|1=Wakayama Prefecture}}, {{ill|Japan|en|Japan|qid=Q17|lt=Japan|1=Japan}}.
As of September 1, 2008, the district has an estimated population of 43,306 and a density of 64.8 persons/km<sup>2</sup>. The total area is 667.92 km<sup>2</sup>.
== Towns and villages == *{{ill|Kitayama, Wakayama|en|Kitayama, Wakayama|qid=Q1354841|lt=Kitayama|1=Kitayama, Wakayama}} *{{ill|Kozagawa, Wakayama|en|Kozagawa, Wakayama|qid=Q1346858|lt=Kozagawa|1=Kozagawa, Wakayama}} *{{ill|Kushimoto, Wakayama|en|Kushimoto, Wakayama|qid=Q1343733|lt=Kushimoto|1=Kushimoto, Wakayama}} *[[:en:Nachikatsuura, Wakayama|Nachikatsuura]] *{{ill|Taiji, Wakayama|en|Taiji, Wakayama|qid=Q1023770|lt=Taiji|1=Taiji, Wakayama}}
== Mergers == *On April 1, 2005 - the town of {{ill|Kushimoto, Wakayama|en|Kushimoto, Wakayama|qid=Q1343733|lt=Kushimoto|1=Kushimoto, Wakayama}} from {{ill|Nishimuro District, Wakayama|en|Nishimuro District, Wakayama|qid=Q1131323|lt=Nishimuro District|1=Nishimuro District, Wakayama}} merged with the town of {{ill|Koza, Wakayama|en|Koza, Wakayama|qid=Q2675119|lt=Koza|1=Koza, Wakayama}}, formerly from Higashimuro District, to form the new town of {{ill|Kushimoto, Wakayama|en|Kushimoto, Wakayama|qid=Q1343733|lt=Kushimoto|1=Kushimoto, Wakayama}} (now part of Higashimuro District). *On May 1, 2005 - the town of {{ill|Hongū, Wakayama|en|Hongū, Wakayama|qid=Q2251838|lt=Hongū|1=Hongū, Wakayama}} merged into the city of {{ill|Tanabe, Wakayama|en|Tanabe, Wakayama|qid=Q304266|lt=Tanabe|1=Tanabe, Wakayama}}. *On October 1, 2005 - the town of {{ill|Kumanogawa, Wakayama|en|Kumanogawa, Wakayama|qid=Q3268163|lt=Kumanogawa|1=Kumanogawa, Wakayama}} merged into the city of {{ill|Shingū, Wakayama|en|Shingū, Wakayama|qid=Q823526|lt=Shingū|1=Shingū, Wakayama}}.
{{Wakayama}}
{{coord|33.600|N|135.791|E|type:landmark_source:itwiki|display=title}}
{{Authority control}} {{Wakayama-geo-stub}}
